title: Remove v1 animation API + update internals
description: Remove AnimationPlayer/AnimationSequence/Frame from public API and route internals through V2 native methods.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Starting implementation for V2 breaking redesign. Scope in this task: remove legacy top-level animation API, add V2-native models/methods, and wire internals to native transport commands.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Completed breaking API migration: removed legacy , replaced top-level exports with V2 native models, and updated internals to native command semantics.
